title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_retrieval.py (第 420 至 633 行，共 633 行) ---
 420 |             recency_weight = self._recency_weight(doc.timestamp)
 421 |             type_weight = self._type_weight(doc.kind, query)
 422 |             score = bm25_score + importance_weight + recency_weight + file_match + error_match + type_weight
 423 | 
 424 |             reasons = []
 425 |             if bm25_score:
 426 |                 reasons.append(f"匹配关键词/文本相关 {bm25_score:.2f}")
 427 |             if importance_weight:
 428 |                 reasons.append(f"重要性 {importance_weight:.2f}")
 429 |             if recency_weight:
 430 |                 reasons.append(f"时间 {recency_weight:.2f}")
 431 |             if file_match:
 432 |                 reasons.append(f"文件匹配 {file_match:.2f}")
 433 |             if error_match:
 434 |                 reasons.append(f"错误匹配 {error_match:.2f}")
 435 |             if type_weight:
 436 |                 reasons.append(f"类型匹配 {type_weight:.2f}")
 437 | 
 438 |             if score > 0 or not query_terms:
 439 |                 ranked.append((doc, score, reasons or ["默认召回"]))
 440 | 
 441 |         ranked.sort(key=lambda item: item[1], reverse=True)
 442 |         results: List[MemoryRecallResult] = []
 443 |         seen = set()
 444 |         for doc, score, reasons in ranked:
 445 |             if doc.id in seen:
 446 |                 continue
 447 |             seen.add(doc.id)
 448 |             results.append(MemoryRecallResult(
 449 |                 item=doc.to_memory_item(),
 450 |                 score=score,
 451 |                 source=doc.source_type,
 452 |                 reason="; ".join(reasons),
 453 |             ))
 454 |             if len(results) >= top_k:
 455 |                 break
 456 |         return results
 457 | 
 458 |     def _build_documents(self, include_summaries: bool = True, include_items: bool = True) -> List[MemoryDocument]:
 459 |         documents: List[MemoryDocument] = []
 460 |         if include_items:
 461 |             documents.extend(MemoryDocument.from_memory_item(item) for item in self.long_term_memory.get_all_items())
 462 |         if include_summaries:
 463 |             documents.extend(MemoryDocument.from_session_summary(summary, source_type="summary_compat") for summary in self.episodic_memory.get_all())
 464 |             for session_id in self.long_term_memory.get_all_session_ids():
 465 |                 summary = self.long_term_memory.retrieve(session_id)
 466 |                 if summary:
 467 |                     documents.append(MemoryDocument.from_session_summary(summary, source_type="summary_compat"))
 468 |         return documents
 469 | 
 470 |     def _calculate_text_bm25_score(self, query_terms: List[str], text: str) -> float:
 471 |         doc_terms = self._tokenize(text)
 472 |         if not query_terms or not doc_terms:
 473 |             return 0.0
 474 |         term_freq: Dict[str, int] = {}
 475 |         for term in doc_terms:
 476 |             term_freq[term] = term_freq.get(term, 0) + 1
 477 |         score = 0.0
 478 |         for term in query_terms:
 479 |             if term in term_freq:
 480 |                 tf = term_freq[term]
 481 |                 score += (tf * 2.5) / (tf + 1.5)
 482 |         return score
 483 | 
 484 |     def _file_match_score(self, doc: MemoryDocument, normalized_file: str) -> float:
 485 |         for candidate in doc.files:
 486 |             normalized_candidate = self._normalize_path(candidate)
 487 |             if normalized_candidate == normalized_file:
 488 |                 return 1.2
 489 |             if normalized_file in normalized_candidate or normalized_candidate in normalized_file:
 490 |                 return 0.75
 491 |             if normalized_candidate.split("/")[-1] == normalized_file.split("/")[-1]:
 492 |                 return 0.45
 493 |         return 0.0
 494 | 
 495 |     def _error_match_score(self, doc: MemoryDocument, normalized_error: str) -> float:
 496 |     ...
